bannerSubtitleZh: 课题组最新动态与活动
bannerSubtitleEn: Latest updates and events from our research group

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：课题组成员获得XX奖学金
news.titleEn: News: Group member received XX scholarship
news.excerptZh: 在此填写新闻的简要描述，介绍事件的背景和意义。课题组成员在XX评选中脱颖而出，获得这一荣誉。
news.excerptEn: Brief description of the news event, including background and significance.

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：课题组在XX会议上作报告
news.titleEn: News: Group presented at XX conference
news.excerptZh: 课题组PI受邀在XX国际会议上发表主题报告，分享最新研究成果并与同行进行深入交流。
news.excerptEn: PI was invited to give a keynote presentation at XX international conference.

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：最新论文发表在Nature Chemistry
news.titleEn: News: Latest paper published in Nature Chemistry
news.excerptZh: 课题组最新研究成果在Nature Chemistry发表，该工作探索了XX领域的关键问题。
news.excerptEn: Latest research published in Nature Chemistry, exploring key problems in XX field.

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：课题组年终总结与展望
news.excerptZh: 课题组召开年度总结会议，回顾过去一年的科研成果并规划来年的研究方向。
news.excerptEn: Annual summary meeting reviewing research achievements and planning future directions.

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：新同学加入课题组
news.titleEn: News: New students joined the group
news.excerptZh: 热烈欢迎新入学的研究生同学加入课题组，祝愿大家在未来的科研道路上取得优异成绩。
news.excerptEn: Warmly welcome new graduate students to join the group.

news.titleZh: 新闻标题示例：课题组团建活动
news.excerptZh: 课题组组织了一次丰富多彩的团建活动，增进了成员间的交流与合作。
news.excerptEn: The group organized a team building activity to enhance communication and cooperation.
